parity.notes: Counted on the reference solutions: 1 static class/module + TotalCovered (loop, 2) + ContainsPoint (loop + branch, 3) + GapCount (loop + branch, 3) both arms. ClipCovered: C# uses Math.Max/Math.Min (loop + 1 branch, 3); Calor expresses the same max/min as two clamp branches (loop + 3 branches, 5). 13/11 = 1.18, within the ±30% band (gates doc §3.3). Complexity = 1 per function + 1 per branch/loop. Second-wave hardness pair (half-open boundary semantics, negative-overlap flooring, touching-vs-gapped intervals, empty set); NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).

wedgeWhitelistCheck: Calor-arm contracts: (== §LEN starts §LEN ends) — equality over the lengths of two simple-variable array bases (modeled-forms §2, ArrayLengthNode -> u32 $length variable, one per array); (<= lo hi) — comparison over i32 parameters; (>= result 0) on TotalCovered/ClipCovered/GapCount. No function calls, no floats, no strings, no computed array bases, no generic-typed values appear in any contract. All functions are pure (§E{}), so no effect-manifest coverage is required.
retiredReason: hardness-check-001: at ceiling; cannot power the 2a gate
